page_content:
Formerly: CCJS678G.

CCJS614 Criminal Law (3 Credits)

Chinese criminal law and its interpretation, principles, and methods. Restriction: Students enrolled in the CCJS Masters Program in China. Credit Only Granted for. CCJS614 or CCJS678F.

Formerly: CCJS678F.

CCJS615 Criminal Procedure Law (3 Credits)

This course is intended to introduce students to basic issues in China's criminal procedure law.

Credit Only Granted for. CCJS678E or CCJS615.
